message:
fix(suggest): make dependency direction deterministic with 3-level tiebreaking

Refactor dependency_direction() to use a clean priority → creation_time → id
comparison chain instead of mixed conditionals that could produce inconsistent
results when priority and timestamp disagreed. The new implementation:

- Compares priority first (lower numeric = higher priority = blocker)
- Falls back to creation time (earlier = blocker)
- Uses lexicographic ID comparison as final tiebreaker
- Eliminates ambiguous None-handling branches

Also sync beads issue tracker state.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
